name: figma
description: Plugin that includes the Figma MCP server and Skills for common workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Design-to-code workflows powered by Figma MCP
interface.longDescription: Figma workflows for implementing designs in code, creating Code Connect templates and mappings, generating or updating Figma designs, building design system libraries, and creating project-specific design system rules with the official Figma MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a Figma design and implement it in code
Create Code Connect templates for my components
Build or update a screen in Figma
